title: Crimson Nova
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}}
[[File:JustissSW89.jpg|thumb|250px|Crimson Nova members [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]], [[Breela]] and [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]] catch up with [[Kai Justiss]] on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]].]]
The '''Crimson Nova''' was a chapter of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] that specialized in [[Jedi hunter|hunting]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. The Crimson Nova operated prior to and during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and was considered one of the most powerful. The Crimson Nova operated out of [[The Rig]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Stenness Node]].

==History==
During the Clone Wars, the leader of the Crimson Nova, a [[Farghul]] named [[Mika (Farghul)|Mika]], was approached by [[Kh'aris Fenn]], who [[Jedi hunter/Legends|offered bounties on members of the]] [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Prior to this meeting, when a [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Stroth]] had been in charge, the Crimson Nova had steered clear of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. However, Mika sanctioned these [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] bounties, which led to a [[Battle of Null (Crimson Nova)|devastating attack]] on Jedi on [[Null/Legends|Null]]. This caught the attention of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. Windu, along with Masters [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]], [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] and [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]], [[Mission to the Rig|disbanded]] the chapter after they refused to cooperate.

This chapter also included [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]];<ref name="TFUCG">''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]''</ref> she later gave the Jedi information that helped lead to Crimson Nova in return for being released from [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]].

Crimson Nova eventually resurfaced under Mika's lead after she returned from a stint in prison. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Nova members [[Breela]] (Mika's daughter), [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]] and [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]] tracked down and engaged the fugitive Jedi Master [[Kai Justiss]] on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]].
